memory_hint:
Interfaces vs Types in TypeScript.

Update March 2021: The newer TypeScript Handbook (also mentioned in nju-clc answer below) has a section
failure_without_memory:
What is the difference between these statements (interface vs type) in TypeScript?

interface X {
    a: number
    b: string
}

type X = {
    a: number
    b: string
};
